bird.name: Sulawesi streaked flycatcher
bird.summary: The Sulawesi streaked flycatcher (Muscicapa sodhii) is a small passerine bird in the Old World flycatcher family. It has only been recorded…

relations.subject: Sulawesi streaked flycatcher
relations.evidence: The Sulawesi streaked flycatcher is considered to be a vulnerable species due to habitat loss caused by deforestation and conversion of forested areas to agriculture
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Sulawesi streaked flycatcher
relations.evidence: The Sulawesi streaked flycatcher is considered to be a vulnerable species due to habitat loss caused by deforestation and conversion of forested areas to agriculture
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
